description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer with a large, rectangular, metallic head and a long, straight wooden handle. The head is a solid block with slightly beveled edges and a flat striking face, designed for delivering powerful blows. The handle is made of wood, square in cross-section, and extends well beyond the head, providing ample leverage for two-handed use. The metallic head is a light gray color, while the handle is a natural wood brown. There are no visible markings, logos, or signs of wear on either the head or the handle. The overall design is utilitarian, with no additional features or accessories.
description: A heavy sledgehammer with a rectangular gray metal head and a long, straight wooden handle. The tool is clean, simple, and shows no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, flat face of the metallic head and the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow edge of the hammer head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the opposite flat face of the head and the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile of the head and the handle's straightness.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle, square in cross-section, smooth surface, no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head, solid steel, flat striking faces, no claws or peens.
